description: Provides the Java Servlet public draft API interfaces and classes used by Java web applications and servlet containers to handle requests, responses, sessions, filters, and listeners. It lets applications compile against the standard javax.servlet contracts without bundling a servlet container implementation.

Provides the Java Servlet 2.4 API interfaces and classes used by Java web applications and servlet containers to handle requests, responses, sessions, filters, and listeners. It lets applications compile against the standard javax.servlet contracts without bundling a servlet container implementation.

Provides the Java Servlet 2.3 and JSP 1.2 API interfaces and classes used by Java web applications and servlet containers to model requests, responses, sessions, filters, and JSP pages. It lets applications compile against the standard javax.servlet and javax.servlet.jsp contracts without bundling a servlet container implementation.
